sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45623" key="e)febdomatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφεβδομᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n45623.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">presiding over the week</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεοί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">PLeid.W.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.34</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
